sentences.arabic: يَحْتَفِلُ الْمُسْلِمُونَ بِعِيدِ الْفِطْرِ بَعْدَ انْتِهَاءِ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ.
sentences.translation: Muslimani slave Eid al-Fitr nakon završetka ramazana.
sentences.translationEn: Muslims celebrate Eid al-Fitr after the end of Ramadan.

sentences.arabic: يَلْبَسُ الْأَطْفَالُ مَلَابِسَ جَدِيدَةً وَيَتَبَادَلُ النَّاسُ التَّهَانِيَ وَالْهَدَايَا.
sentences.translation: Djeca oblače novu odjeću, a ljudi razmjenjuju čestitke i poklone.
sentences.translationEn: Children wear new clothes and people exchange greetings and gifts.

sentences.arabic: تَمْتَلِئُ الشَّوَارِعُ بِالنَّاسِ الْفَرِحِينَ وَيُقَدَّمُ الطَّعَامُ الْحَلْوُ فِي كُلِّ مَكَانٍ.
sentences.translation: Ulice su ispunjene radosnim ljudima i svuda se nude slatka jela.
sentences.translationEn: Streets fill with joyful people and sweets are offered everywhere.

sentences.arabic: تَزُورُ الْعَائِلَاتُ بَعْضَهَا وَيُصَلِّي الْمُسْلِمُونَ صَلَاةَ الْعِيدِ فِي الصَّبَاحِ.
sentences.translation: Porodice se međusobno posjećuju, a muslimani ujutro klanjaju bajram-namaz.
sentences.translationEn: Families visit one another and Muslims perform the Eid prayer in the morning.
